sentences.english: I started taking driving lessons last month.
My instructor is very patient and explains everything clearly.
sentences.korean: 강사님은 매우 인내심이 있고 모든 것을 명확하게 설명해주세요.

sentences.english: Parking is the hardest part for me.
I always get nervous when I have to parallel park.
sentences.korean: 평행 주차를 해야 할 때 항상 긴장돼요.

sentences.english: My driving test is next month and I hope I pass on the first try.
sentences.korean: 운전 시험이 다음 달인데 첫 시도에 합격하면 좋겠어요.
